summary: Barcode label printing app with validation - 58mm x 43mm labels
architectural_notes: Barcode prefix validation on 1st and 2nd scans

existing_features.title: Update label dimensions to 58mm width × 43mm height in the label settings store and ensure all CPCL generation uses these exact dimensions

Adjust barcode width parameters to ensure both barcodes fit completely within the 58mm label width for scannable output, matching the layout shown in the uploaded reference photos where barcodes span nearly the full label width without clipping

When scanning the 1st or 2nd barcode in ScanPrintTab, if the scanned barcode has an incorrect prefix (not matching any configured prefix mappings), display an error message, play the error sound, and automatically clear the input box so the user can scan again immediately
Detect and show an error if the user scans the same serial number again (duplicate serial detection), preventing duplicate processing

new_feature_requests.summary: Adjust barcode width to fit entire barcode on 58mm x 43mm label for scanning
Clear input box when incorrect barcode prefix detected (1st or 2nd scan)
Show error if user scans same serial number again
